chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.D-199 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority). 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA No.650/2026 (151 CPC). 3. For hearing of main case. 24.03.2026 Mr. Athar Ali Mirani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Imran Mobeen, Assistant P.G along with SIP Ali Mardan..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Investigation officer is present in compliance of order dated 26.02.2026 he states that FIR has been disposed of under c-class. Under such circumstances counsel for petitioner does not press instant petition. In view of such statement, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
